# Jose Romero — Senior Product Designer

Jose Romero is a senior product designer based in Zaragoza, Spain, with 12 years
of professional experience across digital product design, conversion rate
optimisation (CRO), behavioural economics, and design operations.
He works in English and Spanish at professional level (C1 English).

## Current role
Senior Product Designer at Garaje de Ideas / Groupe EDG, embedded full-time
within IKEA's New Business Platform team in Spain. Working on:
- IKEA Home Services: peer-to-peer home improvement services marketplace.
  500,000+ downloads, 21,000 service requests, 4.9/5 satisfaction.
  Live in seven Spanish cities as of 2026.
- IKEA Second-hand Marketplace: peer-to-peer resale of IKEA products,
  now live in five European countries, scaling across Europe.
- IKEA Ways of Working System: cross-tool design operations framework spanning
  Figma, Jira, Confluence, and Phrase. Built from first principles to replace
  informal, person-dependent process with documented, teachable structure.
  Includes a five-phase content workflow with explicit ownership handoffs and
  a Phrase localisation optimization that made translations verifiable in QA
  for the first time.

## Previous experience — Flat 101 / Groupe EDG (2021–2023)
Senior UX/CRO Designer across 4–8 concurrent enterprise accounts:
- Santander Nordics — CRO Programme: lead UX/CRO designer across Denmark,
  Sweden, Finland, and Norway. Multi-market, legally constrained A/B testing.
- Meliá Hotels International — Campaign Management Platform: 3-year engagement,
  zero-to-one internal tool, live across all Meliá markets globally.
- Mapfre — AFIN Financial App: self-service financial app covering investments,
  savings, and pension plans. Progressive disclosure information architecture
  and a Financial Advisor feature built around user trust and autonomy.
- Mapfre — Digital Expansion: lead designer on Verti platform redesign
  (Italy, Germany, Spain), Insurance Offices & Agents Directory for Latin America,
  and international CRO across Mapfre brands.
- IQOS Club Spain — CRO Programme: project lead, ongoing optimisation of the
  Philip Morris loyalty portal using behavioural economics frameworks.
- XTI Store — E-commerce Redesign: full redesign of a national fashion retailer's
  digital storefront within Magento platform constraints; informed by Hotjar
  session data and competitive analysis.
- Mutua Madrileña — CRO: +41% increase in qualified leads.
- AXA Spain — CRO Programme: +18% increase in insurance contracts.
- Additional accounts: Bankinter, Subaru Spain, Affinity Petcare.

## Earlier experience
- Design Director / Founder, independent studio, Havana Cuba (2013–2019):
  120+ projects across identity, print, video, digital, and campaigns.
- UI Design Professor, ISDi / Universidad de La Habana (2018–2021).

## Key capabilities
Product design, UX research, information architecture, CRO strategy,
A/B testing (Optimizely, AB Tasty, VWO, ContentSquare, Hotjar),
behavioural economics applied to design, design systems, design operations,
AI-assisted workflow design, process architecture, Shape Up methodology
facilitation, enterprise stakeholder management, multi-market localisation,
bilingual design documentation (EN/ES).

    /work/ikea-home-services/

    /work/melia-hotels-campaign-platform/

    /work/mapfre-afin-digital-expansion/

    /work/mapfre-digital-expansion/
07. IQOS Club Spain — CRO Programme — loyalty, behavioural economics, low-traffic testing
    /work/iqos-club-cro/

    /work/xti-ecommerce-redesign/
